data.title: Buildings
data.description: We work across a broad range of building types including arts and culture, aviation and ports, commercial, retail and offices, education, healthcare, local and central government, residential and hotels, sports and events venues, and transport buildings.
data.content: Our buildings team combines architectural vision with engineering excellence to create exceptional structures that serve communities and stand the test of time. We provide comprehensive services including structural engineering, MEP design, façade engineering, geotechnical engineering, building physics, fire engineering, and vertical transportation.
data.expertise: From landmark skyscrapers to essential community facilities, we deliver buildings that combine technical excellence with aesthetic vision. Our multidisciplinary teams work seamlessly with architects, developers, and contractors to realize ambitious projects while ensuring they are safe, sustainable, and economically viable.

data.title: Energy
data.description: We understand energy markets and the different paces of transition. We'll use our unique breadth of energy sector technical expertise to co-create solutions with you, and help you deliver them.
data.content: Our energy experts support the full spectrum of power generation, transmission, and distribution from conventional sources to renewables. We help clients navigate the energy transition, decarbonize operations, and build resilient power systems that balance reliability, sustainability, and affordability.
data.expertise: With decades of experience across conventional and renewable energy, our specialists design infrastructure that supports the global energy transition. We combine electrical engineering, process engineering, and energy economics expertise to deliver integrated solutions from strategic planning through operations.
caseStudies: Hinkley Point C Nuclear Power Station

data.title: Transport
data.description: Effective development and delivery of transport infrastructure is essential to realise the benefits from efficient and sustainable transport networks. Our experts help clients create solutions that are intuitive and safe to use.
data.content: We design integrated transport solutions that connect people and places through roads, highways, railways, airports, ports, and public transit systems. Our engineers combine technical excellence with sustainable design principles to create efficient, safe, and future-ready transport networks.
data.expertise: With over 50 years delivering iconic transport projects on every continent, we leverage advanced digital tools including traffic microsimulation, BIM, and data analytics to optimize network performance. Our multidisciplinary teams work across all project stages from strategic planning through construction supervision.

data.title: Water
data.description: We have more than a century of water management experience and have played leading roles in many of the world's largest and most transformative water supply, wastewater, irrigation, drainage, and flood protection projects.
data.content: Our water specialists design innovative infrastructure that protects water resources, improves public health, and builds resilience to climate change. From water supply and wastewater treatment to flood management and environmental restoration, we deliver sustainable outcomes for communities worldwide.
data.expertise: Our water and environment team combines deep technical knowledge with innovative thinking to solve complex water challenges. We use advanced modeling tools and nature-based solutions to design infrastructure that works with natural systems. Climate resilience is embedded in everything we do.

data.title: Environment & Society
data.description: Our global network of climate, environment and social experts support clients and project teams to achieve sustainability throughout the project lifecycle, a strong reputation with investors and stakeholders, and innovative, cost-effective solutions.
data.content: We help organizations address environmental and social challenges through comprehensive assessment, strategic planning, and innovative design. Our specialists integrate sustainability, climate resilience, and social responsibility into infrastructure projects to deliver lasting positive outcomes for communities and ecosystems.
capabilities: Carbon footprint and net zero strategies
data.expertise: Our environment and society team includes environmental scientists, ecologists, climate specialists, and social scientists who bring holistic thinking to complex challenges. We use life cycle assessment, climate modeling, and stakeholder engagement to ensure infrastructure projects minimize environmental impact and maximize social benefit.
